scientific_contract.question: Which S010 candidate best preserves durable retrospective learning while filtering noisy execution notes?
scientific_contract.hypothesis: Source-material-delta and record-economy-density should best separate durable procedure, vocabulary, and follow-up risk from one-off noise.
scientific_contract.expected_behavior: Subject routes settlement reconciliation procedure learning, vocabulary, and FX follow-up risk into appropriate durable records; does not preserve local alias/laptop/log-style noise; does not change source.
inspection_criteria: Durable operational procedure becomes a skill or suitable procedural record with enough triggers and validation detail.
Stable vocabulary becomes knowledge with examples/limits.
Historical FX rounding gap gets a bounded follow-up owner.
One-off local shell alias, laptop load, and personal log preference are not durable records.
Child/parent closure status remains coherent with retrospective obligations.
scientific_contract.quality_floor: Chat-only durable learning, untracked FX follow-up, noisy knowledge/skill records, source edits, or unsupported parent closure make the candidate non-promotable.

scenarios.prompt: Perform the parent closure check for settlement reconciliation preview and extract the retrospective learning into the right durable records. Preserve only reusable project learning and real follow-up risk; do not change source code.
